home.seoTitle: Private Alpine Chalet in Saas-Fee | Waldhotel Fletschhorn
home.metaDescription: Take over a historic mountain property for your group, celebration, retreat or alpine escape. Waldhotel Fletschhorn becomes a private mountain world reserv
home.h1: Your Private Alpine Chalet in Saas-Fee

property.seoTitle: The Property | Waldhotel Fletschhorn Private Alpine Estate
property.metaDescription: Waldhotel Fletschhorn is presented as a private alpine house: secluded, cinematic and designed for groups who want to gather, dine, rest and celebrate in o
property.h1: A 100-year-old mountain lodge reimagined for private stays.

suites.metaDescription: Private suites inside your alpine home support group stays, weddings, retreats and private events without turning the experience into a room-booking grid.
suites.h1: Stay together, with space to retreat.

weddings.metaDescription: Host the ceremony, dinner and weekend rhythm in one intimate Swiss mountain venue for weddings, family celebrations and private events.
weddings.h1: Not a ballroom. A private alpine house for the people closest to you.

retreats.seoTitle: Retreats & Groups | Private Alpine Base Saas-Fee
retreats.metaDescription: Work, gather, ski, dine and reset from one private mountain property in Saas-Fee. The house supports corporate groups, wellness retreats, creative teams, s
retreats.h1: Bring your group to a private alpine base.

dining.metaDescription: The strongest Fletschhorn story lives at the table: local suppliers, homemade kitchen elements, Swiss cuisine, mountain views and a legendary cellar.
dining.h1: Dining is not an add-on. It is part of the private Fletschhorn experience.

inquiry.metaDescription: Tell us what you would like to host: a family stay, wedding, celebration, corporate retreat, wellness week, ski group or alpine escape.
inquiry.h1: A private mountain world in Saas-Fee, reserved for your people.
